meta.title: Revised Nomenclature of Campylobacter laridis, Enterobacter intermedium, and "Flavobacterium branchiophila"
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The names Campylobacter laridis, Enterobacter intermedium, and "Flavobacterium branchiophila" are revised to Campylobacter lari, Enterobacter intermedius, and "Flavobacterium branchiophilum," respectively, according to Rule 12c of the International Code of Nomenclature of Bacteria.
